title: The Right Hand
prompt: A sphinx bars the room. Complete its proof to banish it.
lore: Scratched on the wall, in a hand you almost recognize: WILL I BE ENOUGH?
help: From a conjunction `A /\ B` you may keep just one half. `and_right(A, B)` asks for a proof of `A /\ B` (you hold `both`) and yields `B`. Supply the conjunction with `by both;`.
